DISCOVERY 610, DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF TO PROVIDE RESPONSES TO WRITTEN DISCOVERY AND TO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO RESPOND AND TO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,140, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT. NOT REPORTED.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-02-2010 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-23-2010 Off Calendar

Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Pltf To Provide Responses To Written Discovery And To Produce Documents And For Sanctions Against Pltf And His Counsel In The Amt. $3,420.
Off Calendar Feb-08-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted as follows: Defendant's Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Provide Responses To Written Discovery And To Produce Documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Plaintiff is ordered to respond and to produce documents within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $1,140, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported. (612/EAH)

Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Deeming Admitted Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Deeming Admitted The Truthfulness Of Matters Requested Of Pltf And For Sanctions Against Pltf And His Counsel In The Amount Of $2,280.
Off Calendar Feb-08-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted as follows: Defendant's Motion For An Order Deeming Admitted The Truthfulness Of Matters Requested Of Plaintiff is granted. No opposition has been filed. Sanctions are awarded against Plaintiff in the amount of $760, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported. (612/EAH)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Deeming Admitted The Truthfulness Of Matters Requested Of Pltf And For Sanctions Against Pltf And His Counsel In The Amount Of $2,280.
